title: Port Zephyr LICHEN L2 into active west module
description: Move/adapt the reviewed L2 network interface from firmware/bridge-zephyr into lichen/subsys/lichen, wire Kconfig/CMake, and validate gateway builds with CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y.
notes: Ported reviewed Zephyr L2 network-interface code into active lichen/subsys/lichen/l2 component; removed bridge-zephyr cross-tree Kconfig/CMake inclusion; added native_sim-only synthetic hardware ID fallback so CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 can initialize without hardware hwinfo; validated gateway native_sim build on EC2 Linux and smoke-ran zephyr.exe until LICHEN_L2 initialized, enabled, configured LoRa loopback, and started RX thread. Also updated lichen/tests/util to use active l2/lichen_util.c. Review pass 1: integration/build hygiene checked with git diff --check and active-module bridge-reference search. Review pass 2: runtime identity/security assumptions checked; synthetic hardware ID is gated to CONFIG_BOARD_NATIVE_SIM and hardware builds still fail without stable hwinfo identity.
close_reason: Completed: active module owns L2 source/Kconfig/CMake, gateway native_sim builds with CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y, and smoke run initializes/enables L2 with LoRa loopback RX thread.
